intent: Execute a cherry-picking protocol using a P300 single-channel pipette to transfer specified volumes between designated source and destination wells across multiple plates (1-6 plates). The protocol reads transfer parameters from a CSV file containing tip locations, source/destination plate positions, well coordinates, and transfer volumes. Each transfer includes aspiration from 1mm above the source well bottom, addition of a 5µL air gap, dispense to 1mm above destination well bottom, and optional tip touch with 0.75 radius at -2mm vertical offset.
